# wake CLI Reference

Manage systemd user timers from TOML configs

Version: 0.1.0

## Commands

- [check](cli-check.html) -- Run project checks
- [install](cli-install.html) -- Install a schedule from a TOML config file
- [list](cli-list.html) -- List installed schedules
- [remove](cli-remove.html) -- Remove an installed schedule
- [status](cli-status.html) -- Show status of a schedule
